text_raw: to lay out on the sand.
text_clean: to lay out on the sand.

text_raw: I got sand in my eyes!
text_clean: I got sand in my eyes!

text_raw: The wind may howl, but my shot stays true.
text_clean: The wind may howl, but my shot stays true.

text_raw: You'll meet your dusk to the tune of my shot.
text_clean: You'll meet your dusk to the tune of my shot.

text_raw: The sand will swallow even your shade.
text_clean: The sand will swallow even your shade.

text_raw: You flee almost as well as I shoot...
text_clean: You flee almost as well as I shoot...

text_raw: Run. Hide. It makes no difference.
text_clean: Run. Hide. It makes no difference.

text_raw: The wind and sand don't blind me.

text_raw: I'll put a shot straight through your heart.

text_raw: The rule's simple... the one who shoots first wins.

text_raw: I'm only waiting beneath the sand.

text_raw: Go on, fade into the dusk!

text_raw: Dusk will be your dying light.
